headline: Shares of semiconductor stocks are trading lower as stocks pull back after surging Wednesday following President Trump's tariff pause announcement.
summary: Shares of semiconductor stocks are trading lower as stocks pull back after surging Wednesday following President Trump's tariff pause announcement.

headline: Solar Stocks Face Reckoning as Valuations Diverge Ahead of Earnings
summary: The solar sector shows split performance with strong annual returns but recent stagnation. First Solar offers value, NextPower quality, AES a high yield, and Generac premium growth—all ahead of key earnings.
